type.description: Type of the operation, `origination` - deployment / contract creation operation.

id.description: Unique ID of the operation, stored in the TzKT indexer database

level.description: The height of the block from the genesis block, in which the operation was included

timestamp.description: Datetime of the block, in which the operation was included (ISO 8601, e.g. `2020-02-20T02:40:57Z`)

block.description: Hash of the block, in which the operation was included

counter.description: An account nonce which is used to prevent operation replay

initiator.description: Information about the initiator of the contract call

sender.description: Information about the account, created a contract

senderCodeHash.description: Hash of the sender contract code, or `null` is the sender is not a contract

nonce.description: An account nonce which is used to prevent internal operation replay

gasLimit.description: A cap on the amount of gas a given operation can consume

gasUsed.description: Amount of gas, consumed by the operation

storageLimit.description: A cap on the amount of storage a given operation can consume

storageUsed.description: Amount of storage, consumed by the operation

bakerFee.description: Fee to the baker, produced block, in which the operation was included (micro tez)

storageFee.description: The amount of funds burned from the sender account for contract storage in the blockchain (micro tez)

allocationFee.description: The amount of funds burned from the sender account for contract account creation (micro tez)

contractDelegate.description: Information about the baker (delegate), which was marked as a delegate in the operation

code.description: Contract code. Note: you can configure code format by setting `micheline` query parameter (`0 | 2` - raw micheline, `1 | 3` - raw micheline string).

storage.description: Initial contract storage value converted to human-readable JSON. Note: you can configure storage format by setting `micheline` query parameter.

diffs.description: List of bigmap updates (aka big_map_diffs) caused by the origination.

status.description:
Operation status (`applied` - an operation applied by the node and successfully added to the blockchain,
`failed` - an operation which failed with some particular error (not enough balance, gas limit, etc),
`backtracked` - an operation which was a successful but reverted due to one of the following operations in the same operation group was failed,
`skipped` - all operations after the failed one in an operation group)

errors.description: List of errors provided by the node, injected the operation to the blockchain. `null` if there is no errors

originatedContract.description: Information about the originated ( deployed / created ) contract

tokenTransfersCount.description: Number of token transfers produced by the operation, or `null` if there are no transfers

quote.description: Injected historical quote at the time of operation
